input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(166, 138, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: color(srgb 0.02475 0.011 0.044) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: color(srgb 0.0792 0.0352 0.1408) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"search\"].font-family: "??", "Jetbrains Mono", Inter, sans-serif, "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", "Jetbrains Mono", Inter, sans-serif, "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

kbd.background: color(srgb 0.0495 0.022 0.088) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
kbd.font-family: "??", "Jetbrains Mono", "Source Code Pro", monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

mark.background: color(srgb 0.591667 0.3 1 / 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

p.font-family: "??", "Jetbrains Mono", Inter, sans-serif, "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

pre.background: color(srgb 0.0495 0.022 0.088) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: color(srgb 0.0495 0.022 0.088) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "??", "Jetbrains Mono", "Source Code Pro", monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace
